mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password} WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, phone, real_name) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{realName})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_user
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
